meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Accelerate Your Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code and Antigravity to eliminate development bottlenecks. A high-impact checklist for student developers to build apps faster and smarter.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from context switching and manual boilerplate. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate architectural scaffolding and complex debugging. This workflow transforms your terminal into an autonomous engineering assistant, allowing you to focus on feature logic rather than syntax, significantly compressing your development lifecycle from weeks to days.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blinking cursor, the weight of a complex feature set looming over your project. The gap between your vision and a functioning deployment feels like a canyon, widened by repetitive debugging and the friction of manual configuration. Every hour spent wrestling with environment setup is an hour stolen from your growth as an engineer.

But the era of manual coding is shifting. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating it. This setup turns your local environment into a high-velocity lab, allowing you to bypass the trivialities that slow down novices and start shipping production-grade features with expert-level precision.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean, isolated workspace where Claude Code can index your project structure effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and suggest the optimal folder structure for a scalable SaaS MVP, focusing on separation of concerns.

steps.title: Autonomous Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage Antigravity to define your tech stack and generate boilerplate that follows industry best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular Express.js backend schema with TypeScript support, including middleware for JWT authentication and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'scaffold backend with auth middleware'

steps.title: Contextual Code Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to pull in specific documentation or external library patterns to ensure your implementation is modern.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare current React patterns with the latest TanStack Query v5 documentation and refactor my data fetching layer.

steps.title: Predictive Debugging Cycles
steps.description: Instead of reactive fixing, utilize Claude Code to identify potential race conditions before they break your build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a static analysis on my current async functions and identify potential memory leaks or unhandled promises.

steps.title: Deployment Automation Flow
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline through the terminal to ensure every push is tested and ready for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow file that runs my unit tests and deploys to Vercel on every main branch push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'setup ci/cd pipeline for production'

pro_tips: Always use the 'memory' flag in Claude Code to persist your project-specific coding style across sessions.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like technical specifications; the more detail on your tech stack, the fewer hallucinations you encounter.
Use 'claude diff' to review every automated change before applying; it turns the AI into a mentor rather than just a black box.
Keep your context window clean by using .claudeignore files to exclude heavy build artifacts and non-essential assets.
Run 'claude chat --re-index' after major refactors to ensure the AI's internal model of your codebase remains accurate.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, focus on building a 'Proof of Concept' module. Take one complex feature you've been avoiding and use this workflow to complete it in under two hours.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace 90% of developers in your cohort. Stop manually typing boilerplate and start architecting your future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
